products.name: Bar-End Mirror (pair)
products.description: Handlebar bar-end mirror with HD anti-glare stainless lens, mounts inside 14-21mm inner-diameter bars. A universal commuter safety upgrade for flat-bar city ebikes.

fitments.note: Exact size match. Aventon lists the Soltera.2 stock tire as 700x38c (700c wheel). Schwalbe Marathon in 700x38 is the same 700x38 ETRTO fitment. Bike spec: https://electricbikereport.com/aventon-soltera-2-review/ (700c, 38mm); Aventon tire sizing: https://support.aventon.com/04-tire-specs

Spec-inference: Soltera.2 uses 700c rims with 700x38c stock tires (https://electricbikereport.com/aventon-soltera-2-review/). A 700x32 slick mounts on the same 700c rim as a faster/narrower option; confirm rim internal width and fender clearance. No vendor naming statement for this bike.

Diameter match. Soltera.2 seatpost is 27.2mm (Aventon spec, forged alloy 27.2mm 2-bolt clamp, per multiple listings e.g. https://www.amegoev.com/products/aventon-soltera-2-high-step). Suntour NCX SP12 is offered in 27.2mm (https://www.srsuntour.us/products/sp12-ncx-seatpost). Fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment.

Diameter match. Soltera.2 = 27.2mm seatpost. Cane Creek Thudbuster ST ships in 27.2/30.9/31.6mm direct-fit (https://www.canecreek.com/products/thudbuster). 27.2mm variant fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment for this bike.

Universal flat-bar fit. Soltera.2 has flat aluminum handlebars (31.8mm clamp, open bar ends). Hafny bar-end mirror mounts inside 14-21mm inner-diameter bar ends; confirm the bike's grips allow open bar ends. Not bike-specific.

Exact size match. Ramblas stock tire is Maxxis Rekon 29x2.4 on 29" wheels (https://electricbikereview.com/aventon/aventon-ramblas-review/, https://www.aventon.com/products/ramblas-adv-ebike). Maxxis Minion DHF/DHR II 29x2.4 is the same 29x2.4 fitment, a grippier eMTB tread on identical wheel/width.

Spec-inference: Ramblas ships with a RockShox Psylo Silver 130mm-travel 29" fork (https://electricbikereview.com/aventon/aventon-ramblas-review/). RockShox Pike Select is a same-travel (130mm) 29" air fork upgrade; confirm tapered steerer + 15x110 Boost axle before install. No vendor naming statement.

Category fit: Ramblas is a 100Nm mid-drive eMTB with hydraulic disc brakes and 180mm+ rotors. Magura MT5e is an e-bike-rated 4-piston set for exactly this use. Confirm rotor size/mount and lever routing; not a vendor-named fitment for this bike.

Spec-inference by wheel size. Discover 1 uses 26" wheels with 26x2.5 stock tires (https://ccecycles.com/product/velotric-discover-1-high-step/). Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 26x2.15 mounts on the same 26" rim as a narrower puncture-armored commuter tire; confirm rim internal width. Not a vendor-named fitment; width steps down from 2.5 to 2.15.

Diameter match. Discover 1 seatpost is 30.4mm x 350mm (https://ccecycles.com/product/velotric-discover-1-high-step/). Suntour NCX is offered in 30.4mm (https://www.walmart.com/ip/SR-Suntour-NCX-Bicycle-Suspension-Seat-Post-with-Standard-Spring-Specification-30-4-400mm/5388676101). 30.4mm variant fits by diameter; verify exact size when ordering.
Universal saddle fit. Discover 1 uses standard twin-rail saddle clamp. Cloud-9 Cruiser Select is a wide comfort saddle fitting any standard 7mm-rail post; not bike-specific.

Exact size match. Discover 2 stock tire is Kenda 27.5x2.4 on 27.5" wheels (https://electricbikereport.com/velotric-discover-2-review/). Schwalbe Super Moto-X in 27.5x2.4 is the identical 27.5x2.4 fitment, a balloon commuter tire on the same wheel/width.

Diameter match. Discover 2 seatpost is 30.9mm x 350mm (https://electricbikereport.com/velotric-discover-2-review/). Suntour NCX is offered in 30.9mm (https://www.walmart.com/ip/SR-Suntour-NCX-Bicycle-Suspension-Seat-Post-with-Standard-Spring-Specification-30-9-350mm/5387334658). Fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment.
Diameter match. Discover 2 = 30.9mm seatpost. Thudbuster ST ships direct-fit in 30.9mm (https://www.canecreek.com/products/thudbuster). Fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment.
Diameter match. Discover 2 = 30.9mm seatpost; Kinekt Active seatposts are offered in 27.2/30.9/31.6mm. 30.9mm variant fits by diameter; verify size at order. Not a vendor-named fitment.
Universal saddle fit. Discover 2 uses a standard twin-rail clamp; Cloud-9 Comfort Airflow fits any 7mm-rail post. Not bike-specific.

Exact size match. Discover 3 runs the same Kenda 27.5x2.4 puncture-resistant tire as the Discover 2 (https://electricbikereport.com/velotric-discover-3-review/). Schwalbe Super Moto-X 27.5x2.4 is the identical 27.5x2.4 fitment. Bike is new; tire fit is by published-spec match, not aftermarket track record.

Diameter-inference. Discover 3 shares the Discover 2 comfort chassis; Discover 2 seatpost is 30.9mm. Suntour NCX is offered in 30.9mm. Discover 3 is very new - confirm the 30.9mm seatpost diameter on the actual unit before ordering. No vendor naming statement.

Exact size match. Velotric T1 stock tire is Kenda 700x38c on 700c wheels (T1 ST variant is 700x40c) per https://velotric-t1.autologr.com/ and https://ebikeescape.com/velotric-t1-t1st-review/. Schwalbe Marathon 700x38 is the same 700x38 fitment, an armored commuter tire on the identical wheel/width.

Diameter match. T1 seatpost is 30.9mm x 350mm (https://velotric-t1.autologr.com/). Suntour NCX is offered in 30.9mm. Fits by diameter; note the T1 has an integrated non-removable battery but that does not affect seatpost fit. Not a vendor-named fitment.
Universal grip fit. T1 is a flat/riser-bar fitness ebike with standard 22.2mm grip clamp area. Redshift Cruise Control lock-on grips fit standard bars; not bike-specific.

Exact size match. Prodigy V2 stock tire is Maxxis Rekon Race 27.5x2.25 on 27.5" wheels (https://electricbikereview.com/ride1up/prodigy-v2-review/). Schwalbe Marathon Plus MTB in 27.5x2.25 is the identical 27.5x2.25 fitment, a puncture-armored commuter tire on the same wheel/width.

Diameter match. Prodigy V2 uses a 31.6mm seatpost (Ride1Up's own Zoom suspension seatpost for this platform is 31.6mm x 350mm, https://ride1up.com/product/suspension-seatpost/). Thudbuster ST ships direct-fit in 31.6mm. Fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment.

Category fit: Prodigy V2 is a 90Nm Brose mid-drive with hydraulic discs (180mm rotors). Magura MT5e is an e-bike-rated 4-piston set suited to this weight/torque. Confirm rotor/mount spec; not a vendor-named fitment.

Size match on a road wheel. Roadster V2 stock tire is Kenda Kwest 700x28c on 700c wheels (https://electricbikereport.com/ride1up-roadster-review/). Continental Gatorskin in 700x32 mounts on the same 700c rim; 32mm is a common up-size from 28mm on this rim. Verify caliper/fork clearance for 32mm.

Spec-inference. Roadster V3 stock tire is Schwalbe G-One RS 700x45c on 700c wheels (https://ride1up.com/product/roadster-v3/). Gatorskin 700x32 is a narrower slick on the same 700c rim - a faster/lower-rolling-resistance option; the bike clears up to 45mm so 32mm fits with room. Not a vendor-named fitment.

Spec-inference. Roadster V3 = 700c wheels, stock 700x45c, clears wide rubber (https://ride1up.com/product/roadster-v3/). Schwalbe Marathon 700x38 mounts on the same 700c rim as an armored commuter option within the bike's clearance. Not a vendor-named fitment.

Size match on a 27.5" wheel. XPress 750 stock tire is 27.5x2.2 on 27.5" wheels (https://ebikepsi.com/models/lectric-xpress-750). Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5 is an e-bike-rated armored tire for the same 27.5" wheel; confirm the exact 2.0-2.15 width variant vs the 2.2 stock. Same wheel diameter, commuter-appropriate.

Diameter match. XPress 750 seatpost is 31.6mm alloy (https://electricbikereview.com/lectric-ebikes/xpress-750-review/). Suntour NCX SP25 is offered in 31.6mm. Fits by diameter; not a vendor-named fitment for this bike.
Universal saddle fit. XPress 750 uses a standard twin-rail clamp; Cloud-9 Comfort Airflow fits any 7mm-rail post. Not bike-specific.

OEM part for this exact bike. XP 3.0 stock tire is 20x3.0 on 20" wheels (https://ebikepsi.com/models/lectric-xp-3). Lectric's own Street Tire 20x3 is sold by Lectric as the direct replacement/upgrade tire for the XP 3.0 (https://lectricebikes.com/products/street-tire-1-20-x-3-with-reflective-strip).

OEM-sold fitment. XP 3.0 runs 20x3.0 tires; Tannus Armour 20x3.0-4.0 insert is sold by Lectric as the anti-flat insert for the 20x3 XP tire (https://lectricebikes.com/products/tannus-armour-insert-20-x-3-0-4-0). Size range 3.0-4.0 covers the 3.0 tire.

Diameter match. Lectric XP family (incl. XP 3.0) uses a 31.6mm seatpost - Lectric's own suspension post lists XP 3.0 fitment at 1 1/4"/31.6mm (https://lectricebikes.com/products/xp-suspension-seatpost). Thudbuster ST ships direct-fit in 31.6mm. Fits by diameter; verify folding-frame post length/insertion (step-thru vs high-step differ).

OEM part, same wheel/tire family. XP4 stock tire is 20x3.0 on 20" wheels (https://ebikepsi.com/models/lectric-xp4-750). Lectric's Street Tire 20x3 is Lectric's own 20x3 replacement tire; same 20x3.0 fitment as the XP4. Bike is new but shares the established XP 20x3 tire standard.
Size-range fitment. XP4 runs 20x3.0 tires (https://ebikepsi.com/models/lectric-xp4-750); Tannus Armour 20x3.0-4.0 covers the 3.0 width. Same insert Lectric sells for its 20x3 XP tires.

Diameter match. XP4 is named in Lectric's XP suspension-seatpost fitment list at 1 1/4"/31.6mm (https://lectricebikes.com/products/xp-suspension-seatpost). Suntour NCX SP25 is offered in 31.6mm. Fits by diameter; verify folding-frame insertion depth. Not a vendor-named fitment.

Wheel-size fit, width step-up. XP Lite 2.0 stock tire is 20x2.4 on 20" wheels (https://electricbikereport.com/lectric-xp-lite-review/). Lectric's 20x3 street tire mounts on the same 20" rim but is wider (3.0 vs 2.4) - confirm fork/chainstay clearance before fitting the wider tire. Lectric also sells a 20x2.4 XP Lite tire as the exact-size option.

Diameter match. XP Lite 2.0 uses a 31.6mm seatpost (https://electricbikereview.com/lectric-ebikes/lectric-xp-lite-2-0-review/), and is named in Lectric's XP suspension-post fitment list. Thudbuster ST ships in 31.6mm direct-fit. Fits by diameter; verify insertion depth on the lightweight frame. Not a vendor-named fitment.

Wheel-size fit. XPress2 stock tire is a 27.5x2.1 slick on 27.5" wheels (https://electricbikereview.com/lectric-ebikes/lectric-xpress2-review/). Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5 (2.0-2.15 width) is an armored commuter tire on the same 27.5" wheel and close width. Bike is brand-new (2026) - confirm exact width variant and clearance. No vendor naming statement.

Diameter-inference. XPress2 shares the Lectric 31.6mm seatpost standard (XPress 750 predecessor is 31.6mm). Suntour NCX SP25 comes in 31.6mm. Bike is brand-new - confirm the 31.6mm seatpost on the actual unit. No vendor naming statement.

Comfort saddle for a trike. XP Trike uses a standard twin-rail seatpost clamp; the Cloud-9 Tri-Cruiser with backrest is a wide comfort saddle well-suited to the upright trike position. Fits any 7mm-rail post; not trike-specific but appropriate. Confirm rider prefers backrest style.

Diameter match. XP Trike is named in Lectric's XP suspension-post fitment list at 1 1/4"/31.6mm (https://lectricebikes.com/products/xp-suspension-seatpost). Thudbuster ST ships in 31.6mm direct-fit. Fits by diameter; verify the trike's seatpost length/insertion. Not a vendor-named fitment.

Universal comfort saddle. RadWagon 5 (20x3.3 tires, cargo/utility) uses a standard twin-rail clamp. Cloud-9 Cruiser Select fits any 7mm-rail post; a common upright-cargo comfort upgrade. Not bike-specific.

Universal flat-bar fit. RadWagon 5 has flat handlebars; a rear-view mirror is a common cargo/family-hauler safety upgrade. Hafny bar-end mirror needs open bar ends (14-21mm ID) - confirm grip/shifter layout allows it. Not bike-specific.

Universal comfort saddle. RadRunner Plus (2025) is a utility ebike on 20x3.5 tires (https://newatlas.com/bicycles/radrunner-plus-max-2025-refresh/) with a standard twin-rail clamp. Cloud-9 Cruiser Select fits any 7mm-rail post. Bike is new; saddle fit is by standard-clamp inference, not vendor naming.
Universal flat-bar fit. RadRunner Plus has flat bars; bar-end mirror is a common commuter add-on. Requires open bar ends (14-21mm ID) - confirm grip layout. Not bike-specific.

Universal comfort saddle. RadRunner Max is a new (2025) Class-3 utility ebike on 20x3.5 tires with a standard twin-rail seat clamp. Cloud-9 Cruiser Select fits any 7mm-rail post. Bike too new for verified aftermarket track record; fit is by standard-clamp inference.

Universal comfort saddle. Radster Trail (27.5x3 off-road tires, https://electricbikereport.com/rad-power-bikes-radster-trail-review/) uses a standard twin-rail clamp. Cloud-9 Comfort Airflow fits any 7mm-rail post. This is an off-road model - tire/suspension upgrades need model-specific verification; comfort saddle is a safe universal fit.
